Interests

Publications

  • A Hosny and S. Ghokale. Project-based Learning in a Senior-Level Probabilistic Analysis Course in the CS Curriculum. IEEE STEM Education Conference. ISEC’17, Princeton, New Jersey
  • A Hosny, P Vera-Licona, R Laubenbacher, T Favre. AlgoRun, a Docker-based packaging system for platform-agnostic implemented algorithms. Bioinformatics, btw120

  • Master’s Thesis: Integrative Analysis of Heterogeneous Genomics Data for Triple Negative Breast Cancer and High Grade Serous Ovarian Cancer

    Advisors: Reda Ammar and Sheida Nabavi, Sanguthevar Rajasekaran and Yufeng Wu

    Livestream on UConn Mediasite: https://mediasite.dl.uconn.edu/Mediasite/Play/1eaf2cb4cc2f41b5ae425e4c26394ca51d

    Thesis Manuscript: http://digitalcommons.uconn.edu/gs_theses/1032/

  • A Moanes, AH Ibrahim, A Hosny. xGame: A Novel Approach for Developing Accessible Mobile Games. New Trends in Software Methodologies, Tools and Techniques: Proceedings of the Fifteenth SoMeT_16
